business.name: Roberts Electrical LLC
business.tagline: Reliable electrical solutions for Wilmington homes and businesses

hero.headline: When your *lights go out*, we show up
hero.subheadline: Licensed electrician handling everything from ancient wiring to tankless water heater circuits. On time, every time.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Wire, Every Circuit
services_section.subheading: From tracking down dangerous issues to installing new systems — we handle it all

services.title: Electrical Troubleshooting
services.description: GFCI issues, circuit breaker problems, mysterious outages — we track down the problem and fix it fast.

services.title: Panel & Circuit Work
services.description: Upgrading old panels, adding circuits, fixing breakers that won't stay put. Done right the first time.

services.title: Switch & Outlet Repair
services.description: 4-way switches, dead outlets, flickering lights — we diagnose the issue and get everything working again.

services.title: Old House Rewiring
services.description: Ancient insulated wires causing problems? We specialize in updating century-old electrical systems safely.

about.heading: Zach Roberts — Your Wilmington Electrician
about.body: When electrical problems strike, Wilmington homeowners call Roberts Electrical. We've built our reputation on showing up on time, explaining what we're doing, and fixing it right. Whether it's a dangerous wiring issue in your 100-year-old house or a tricky tankless water heater circuit, we handle it with precision and leave your place cleaner than we found it.

reviews.name: Jo-Marie C.
reviews.text: Zach and Austin tackled our complicated job with complete precision. Extremely neat work and cleaned up perfectly before leaving.

reviews.name: Kellyanne C.
reviews.text: Our 100-year-old house had dangerous electrical scares with ancient wiring. Zach was always responsive and fixed everything in hours.

reviews.name: Eric R.
reviews.text: Spectacular service! Timely, professional, and I'll definitely use him again. Solid guy with a great work ethic and business approach.

reviews.name: Randy W.
reviews.text: Quick excellent work on GFCI and circuit breaker issues affecting my tankless water heater. Always communicated visit times and showed up punctually.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Greater Wilmington
service_areas.subheading: Fast response times throughout the Cape Fear region

cta.heading: Electrical Problem? We're On It
cta.body: Don't wait for a small issue to become dangerous. Call Roberts Electrical for fast, professional service you can trust.
